name: Ron Paul
subject: An all-out media assault
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

If you want to know what I really think about my son, Rand, then don't listen to our national media.

Don't listen to the Big Government Washington insiders who'd love nothing more than another Bush/Clinton showdown in November of 2016.

Let me be clear...
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31064284:WKe5fSmNj:m:1:879035888:8EC8402D47C320EBFB633BCC5B7DB950:r)
There is not one candidate who has run for president in my lifetime who can say they fully share my commitment to liberty, Austrian economics, small government, and following the Constitution, than my son, Rand Paul.

That's why I have wholeheartedly endorsed him.

**[And it's why I wanted to write to you today to personally urge you to help Rand reach his $200,000 goal before Tuesday's deadline and make his TV and Radio Ad Blitz in Iowa a success by making your most generous contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31064284:WKe5fSmNj:m:1:879035888:8EC8402D47C320EBFB633BCC5B7DB950:r)**.

_I know the media likes to play this little game where they pit us, or certain views, against each other_.

Don't fall for it. They're trying to manufacture storylines at liberty's expense. You've spent years seeing how the media treated me. They aren't my friends and they aren't yours.

So please don't waste your time or risk the massive gains you and I have made over the past eight years by suddenly believing Big Government apologists in our media are some sort of truth tellers.

Remember, truth is treason in the empire of lies. And nowhere is that more true than when it comes to Washington, D.C. and their media mouthpieces.

Even where Rand and I do have minor differences of opinion, I would take Rand's position over any of his opponents' in both parties every time.

_That's because he advocates diplomacy and negotiations, and opposes war_.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31064284:WKe5fSmNj:m:1:879035888:8EC8402D47C320EBFB633BCC5B7DB950:r)
And Rand is the ONLY one in the race who is standing up for your Liberty, across the board.

You certainly saw a great example of that in the first debate. Chris Christie tried to trample all over your rights in a false attack.

Rand stopped him cold.

And it's nothing new for Rand. Whether it's filibustering to stop drones or the Patriot Act, or introducing the Fourth Amendment Protection Act, no one has fought harder for your rights than Rand.

And that's why, since the moment he announced his candidacy for President of the United States, our national media and the Big Government establishment has gone all-out to smear him or silence him.

They push other Big Government Republicans as "frontrunners" while ignoring polls showing Rand leading Hillary Clinton in key presidential Battleground States.

_They make sure he gets the least amount of time in a national debate (that sounds familiar)_.

They hype other candidates' easy access to Wall Street fat cats who leech off Big Government while ignoring the growing army of small donors Rand is building nationwide.

That's because they fear Rand more than any other candidate. They know he is our best hope to restore liberty, limited government and the Bill of Rights and finally end the big spending status quo in Washington, D.C.

Rand stood on the Senate floor for ten-and-a-half hours to force the Patriot Act to expire. Rand's stamina and determination called the nation's attention to President Obama's illegal and unconstitutional phone records collection. In the Senate, there is no greater champion of the Fourth Amendment and no one as fearless in staring down the establishment, Republican or Democrat.

It was his action, and his alone, that forced the NSA's bulk metadata collection programs to expire under Section 215 of the "PATRIOT Act." Not only that, but he continued to stand strongly against Washington, D.C.'s "Plan B" scheme, the misnamed "USA FREEDOM Act";

When President Obama was insisting on arming the Islamic rebels in Syria and bombing Assad, Rand stood firm and challenged the President. He even took to Fox News' TV airwaves in a live national address to counter President Obama's attempt to "gin up" war fever, infuriating Big Government Republicans like Karl Rove!

And don't forget Rand's first filibuster exposing the Obama administration's lawless use of drones, earning attacks from U.S. Senator Lindsey Graham and "wacko bird" name-calling from Senator John McCain. His historic 13-hour filibuster galvanized the American people unlike anything you and I have ever seen!
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31064284:WKe5fSmNj:m:1:879035888:8EC8402D47C320EBFB633BCC5B7DB950:r)
He's also THE most stalwart opponent of the Federal Reserve in the Senate. He's fought against ObamaCare every step of the way. He's introduced budgets to slash spending and dig us out of our $18.3 TRILLION debt.

_He will keep our country out of senseless foreign wars that cost so many lives and bleed our treasury dry_. He's not afraid to lay the blame for making worse the chaos we see today with ISIS and Iraq squarely at the feet of the neocons.

And he's proven he's unafraid to stand up to anyone in Washington when the times call for it - even the leadership of his own party.

Rand stands ready to lead, and to win. He has my full support. I ask that he also have yours.

The truth is, Rand needs our grassroots army of liberty lovers more than ever.

The national media and the establishment of both parties would love nothing more than to drive a stake through the heart of our Liberty Movement and stop Rand at all costs.

They're going all-out to destroy him just like they tried to destroy me. And if they succeed, they'll go on to even more spending, spying, welfare and warfare in Washington, D.C.

I was able to weather the media's viciousness because I had patriots like you at my side. Because good folks like you stood with me, the Washington Machine failed. Our Liberty Movement continues to grow.

_Now, my son Rand needs us in his corner_. I'm answering the call. I'm proud to say I "Stand with Rand."

**[Can I count on you to join me? Will you please chip in $20.16 or whatever amount you can afford right away to help Rand reach his $200,000 goal before Tuesday's midnight deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31064284:WKe5fSmNj:m:1:879035888:8EC8402D47C320EBFB633BCC5B7DB950:r)**?

Please know every dollar is critical.

Unlike other candidates, Rand isn't depending on Wall Street fat-cats and banksters who want more special treatment, bailouts and stimulus packages to bankroll his candidacy.

He's depending on patriots like you who are willing to fight to take our country back.

Please join me in supporting him. **[Please make your most generous contribution TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31064284:WKe5fSmNj:m:1:879035888:8EC8402D47C320EBFB633BCC5B7DB950:r)**.

For Liberty,

Ron Paul

P.S. There is not one candidate who has run for president in my lifetime who can say they're more committed to liberty, Austrian economics, small government, the Constitution, and a rational foreign policy than my son, Rand Paul.

I'm proud to "Stand with Rand" despite media attacks trying to pit us against each other.

But Rand needs us now more than ever. **[So please chip in $20.16 or whatever you can afford to help Rand hit his $200,000 goal and make his TV and Radio Ad Blitz in Iowa a success](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31064284:WKe5fSmNj:m:1:879035888:8EC8402D47C320EBFB633BCC5B7DB950:r)**.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31064285:WKe5fSmNj:m:1:879035888:8EC8402D47C320EBFB633BCC5B7DB950:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31064286:WKe5fSmNj:m:1:879035888:8EC8402D47C320EBFB633BCC5B7DB950:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31064287:WKe5fSmNj:m:1:879035888:8EC8402D47C320EBFB633BCC5B7DB950:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

name: Ben Carson
subject: I'd like to share a quick story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31064396:s5nIBSmeN:m:1:876315805:092F69A0D0AB51F0F2679B2782511999:r)
---

Peter,

You'd think that spending day after day on the campaign trail is exhausting, but it's actually quite an energizing experience because I get to meet some of the most incredible people.
---
With that in mind, I'd like to share a quick story.

While speaking at a luncheon yesterday in Virginia, my new friend Brandi Bradshaw was working as a server at the event.

After I finished my talk, she stood up in front of the entire group and shared how excited she was about our campaign to heal, inspire and revive our great country.

She then did something amazing and completely unexpected -- she donated $500 of her hard-earned money to my campaign.

I was inspired and moved by Brandi's gesture, and it confirmed why we're going to win.

As Americans, we are at our best when we dream big. Our Founding Fathers created a government that was supposed to encourage our dreams, not inhibit them.

I believe with the right leadership and the right policies, Brandi and every other American will have the opportunity to reach their God-given potential.

That is my mission, and I'm honored that you've decided to join me.

[**Thank you for your continued support and participation.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31064396:s5nIBSmeN:m:1:876315805:092F69A0D0AB51F0F2679B2782511999:r)

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: In It To Win It
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!

www.DonaldJTrump.com [https://www.donaldjtrump.com/] - October 16 2015 - In It To Win It

Dear Peter Willis,

This Wednesday we are visiting Burlington, Iowa - get your tickets here [https://trumpburlington.eventbrite.com/] - We will also be stopping in Jacksonville, Florida [https://trumpflorida.eventbrite.com/] next Saturday, we hope to see you there!

Despite what the mainstream media would like you to think [http://www.donaldjtrump.com/news/a-key-argument-against-taking-donald-trumps-candidacy-seriously-is-evaporat], we continue to dominate [http://www.donaldjtrump.com/news/poll-donald-trump-at-48-percent-among-gop-voters-counting-first-and-second] in all of the polls – 14-weeks straight to be exact [http://www.donaldjtrump.com/news/poll-trump-dominates-in-nevada-south-carolina-overall-and-on-the-issues] – and the people of South Carolina [http://www.donaldjtrump.com/news/donald-trump-has-huge-leads-in-south-carolina-nevada-in-latest-polls], Nevada [http://www.donaldjtrump.com/news/poll-trump-dominates-in-nevada-south-carolina-overall-and-on-the-issues], Connecticut [http://www.donaldjtrump.com/news/trump-is-tops-as-clinton-drops-in-connecticut-primaries-quinnipiac-universi], Florida [http://www.donaldjtrump.com/news/donald-trump-hillary-clinton-lead-in-swing-state-polling] , [http://www.donaldjtrump.com/news/donald-trump-hillary-clinton-lead-in-swing-state-polling] Ohio [http://www.donaldjtrump.com/news/donald-trump-hillary-clinton-lead-in-swing-state-polling], New Hampshire, Iowa [http://www.donaldjtrump.com/news/polls-trump-still-tops-in-iowa-new-hampshire], and Texas [http://www.donaldjtrump.com/news/poll-donald-trump-ted-cruz-lead-in-texas] continue to reaffirm that I am the best candidate for President and I am going to win [http://www.donaldjtrump.com/news/donald-trump-plots-his-second-act].

The next two weeks before the 3rd Debate are going to be busy. Today we are in Tyngsborough, Massachusetts [http://www.eventbrite.com/e/donald-j-trump-massachusetts-rally-tickets-18997729721?aff=es2].

Richmond, VA

The American people have spoken [http://www.donaldjtrump.com/news/poll-donald-trump-at-48-percent-among-gop-voters-counting-first-and-second] and are tired of career politicians who are "all talk and no action." subject: Get The Power Out Of Washington
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW DAY FOR AMERICA NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| [](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=102283&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.NewDayForAmerica.com%2FReformer) Peter, We need to get the power out of Washington and back into the hands of _us_ – the people. There’s one candidate running for President who will get it done. **John Kasich** **will fight the Washington politicians so we can run our country from the bottom up, not the top down.** On Thursday, John Kasich was the first Presidential candidate to release a comprehensive plan that will **balance the federal budget in eight years** **and create jobs** by:
· Shrinking the federal government and returning power to the states
· Cutting taxes to promote economic growth
· Eliminating waste and harmful regulations
· Restoring local control of education
· Promoting America’s energy independence
· Reforming costly entitlement programs **Read more about John Kasich’s plan in _[The Washington Post](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=102283&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fnewdayforamerica.com%2Fnews%2Fjohn-kasich-washington-is-obsolete%2F)_** **__** **John Kasich: Washington Is Obsolete** _The biggest problem with America’s economy is called Washington. The anemic growth we have today isn’t because the federal government failed to do enough but because it succeeded in doing too much. _ [Full article here.](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=102283&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=https%3A%2F%2Fnewdayforamerica.com%2Fnews%2Fjohn-kasich-washington-is-obsolete%2F) The Washington politicians control the power and the money but they haven’t gotten anything done for anyone but themselves – and the rest of us have been left behind. We need real leadership to balance the budget by getting the power out of Washington. We need to elect John Kasich. Join the effort to support John Kasich. Visit [NewDayForAmerica.com](http://click.icptrack.com/icp/relay.php?r=35444401&msgid=102283&act=N28F&c=1559159&destination=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.NewDayForAmerica.com) today. **Matt Carle**
Executive Director
New Day for America

name: Rand Paul
subject: ## media blackout ##
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

In less than two weeks, I'll be taking to the Republican debate stage in Boulder, Colorado for the third showdown with my shrinking field of opponents for the GOP nomination for President.

The national media -- desperate to push party establishment picks and turn this campaign into a TV reality show -- wants nothing more than to blackout my message of liberty and limited government.

So my campaign is preparing to launch a massive TV and Radio Ad Blitz to flood Iowa airwaves during and after this critical debate.

**[Will you please chip in $20.16 or more immediately to help make this a reality](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31067787:s9VrxSmNz:m:1:879035888:421E6B7C42894C3E5BF480432941AD95:r)**?

My staff has run the numbers, and we need to raise $200,000 by Tuesday, October 20th at midnight to make this work.

With your support, we can bust through the media blackout and send shockwaves through the media and the national political establishment.

For the first time in decades, you and I have a true chance to nominate a Republican who will take a sledgehammer to the Washington Machine.

If elected, that's exactly what I'll do.

My plan to institute a 14.5% flat tax, and return $2 TRILLION to the American people, isn't just designed to get our economy moving and create jobs. It's designed to blow up our current tax code and force government to live within its means.

My plan to impose term limits in Washington, D.C. isn't just designed to change a few faces in Congress. It's designed to clean house of Big Government career politicians.

My plan to force Congress to read the bills they pass isn't just designed to force members of Congress to stop passing thousand-page bills at the last minute, it's designed to END lobbyists' grip on Washington, D.C.

If elected, I will fully REPEAL ObamaCare, end domestic government spying and finally audit and expose the damage the U.S. Federal Reserve has wreaked on our country.

Not one of my opponents can make any of these promises.

In fact, they wouldn't even dare.

While they may toss some red meat out every once in awhile to try and fool primary voters, _they think everything is "A-OK" with Big Government_.

But the truth is, our nation is over $18 TRILLION in debt and spending is STILL increasing!

Politicians in BOTH parties have almost succeeded in wiping the Fourth and Tenth Amendments off the books.

Now, they're coming for the First Amendment's protection of religious liberty and our Second Amendment's right to keep and bear arms.

Even after the release of videos showing Planned Parenthood officials admitting they routinely abort unborn babies, dismember them and then sell their body parts for profit, _our elected officials will hardly lift a finger to defund them_!

Everything is not "A-OK."

And with the stakes for our country higher than ever, we can't afford another Republican nominee who will betray us.

We desperately need a President who will completely pull the plug on the Washington Machine and start over.

Whether it's forcing the Obama administration to back down on the use of drones targeting U.S. citizens on American soil, President Obama's attempt to rush to ISIS' aid in Syria, or forcing the worst of the so-called "PATRIOT" Act's provisions to expire, _I have proven I will stand up to anyone in either party to uphold my oath of office_.

But Fellow Conservative, you do have a choice.

You can choose to return to the constitutional principles that have made America great.

You can choose a candidate who can not only DEFEAT Hillary Clinton, but is committed to restoring the principles of liberty you and I hold so dear.

**[So please help me by chipping in your most generous contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31067787:s9VrxSmNz:m:1:879035888:421E6B7C42894C3E5BF480432941AD95:r)**.

We only have until Tuesday, October 20th to hit our $200,000 goal. This is the most critical moment of my campaign to date. So every dollar counts.

I'm confident this TV and Radio Ad Blitz in Iowa is just what we need to break the media's stranglehold on my campaign.

But this plan can only be successful with your help.

With my deadline rapidly approaching, **[will you please chip in a contribution IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31067787:s9VrxSmNz:m:1:879035888:421E6B7C42894C3E5BF480432941AD95:r)**?

Will you help me bust through the media blackout?

Thank you in advance for your generous and continued support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31067788:s9VrxSmNz:m:1:879035888:421E6B7C42894C3E5BF480432941AD95:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31067789:s9VrxSmNz:m:1:879035888:421E6B7C42894C3E5BF480432941AD95:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31067790:s9VrxSmNz:m:1:879035888:421E6B7C42894C3E5BF480432941AD95:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31067791:s9VrxSmNz:m:1:879035888:421E6B7C42894C3E5BF480432941AD95:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31067787:s9VrxSmNz:m:1:879035888:421E6B7C42894C3E5BF480432941AD95:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

**Saturday, October 17, 2015**

This week Senator Rand Paul completed his Iowa 10,000 College Tour with Students for Rand (SFR). Senator Paul was greeted by large and enthusiastic crowds at each stop who were eager to hear his message of small government and civil liberties. SFR is currently in the process of mobilizing 10,000 Iowa college students who will commit to caucus for Rand. Students for Rand will play a key role in the campaign's grassroots organization with 350 chapters nationwide.

While on the trail in Iowa, Rand became the first ever Presidential candidate to live stream an entire day online. Thousands of people tuned in to watch Rand's day to see what an average day is like on the campaign. Many media outlets picked up on the story and thousands of people got to hear Rand Paul's message. Tune in next week for more updates!

Chip Englander
Campaign Manager
Rand Paul for President
| | |
## News of the Week
---
| | |
### MEMO: Rand Paul for President Campaign Standing
There are some in the media who are pushing a false narrative that Senator Rand Paul (SRP) is on the ropes. Here are the facts and why SRP is here to stay.

Political Organization-

Ground game and political organization have a disproportionate impact in primaries and especially caucuses - and SRP has the best organization in America. Three times SRP has competed against the other contenders in presidential straw polls - and every time he has won. He won at the Conservative Political Action Conference, the same straw poll Reagan won that helped launch his 1980 candidacy.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31069621:W9wLUSmSN:m:1:879035888:AF65D2E0E981E6CDB927249D5E5116E6:r)
---
|
### Paul To College Audience: 'I'm Not Here To Send You To War'
Kentucky Sen. Rand Paul told students at Upper Iowa University Tuesday they could count on him to not send them to war if he becomes the next president. "I'm not here to send you to war," the libertarian-leaning senator said to the sparse auditorium Tuesday. "I think the Iraq War was a huge mistake." According to a survey of Americans taken on the 10th anniversary of the 2003 U.S. invasion of Iraq, 50 percent of young adults, ages 18-29, said sending troops to fight in the Middle Eastern country was a mistake. "If there's one true thing about the Middle East, when we topple secular dictators all we've gotten is chaos and instability," Paul said.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31069622:W9wLUSmSN:m:1:879035888:AF65D2E0E981E6CDB927249D5E5116E6:r)
---
|
### Rand Paul Seeks To Rally College Students Around His Platform
WAVERLY | Young people are difficult to rally to the polls, but Republican presidential candidate Rand Paul hopes to change that dynamic in 2016 by laying out an agenda he believes will appeal to those unlikely voters. The U.S. senator from Kentucky has been touring 11 college campuses in Iowa seeking to get 10,000 college students to the Feb. 1 Iowa caucuses. He visited Wartburg College in Waverly on Tuesday, where 150 people -- mostly students -- heard his platform. "We think that the platform that I represent has a great deal of attraction to kids," Paul told The Courier ahead of the event.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31069623:W9wLUSmSN:m:1:879035888:AF65D2E0E981E6CDB927249D5E5116E6:r)

name: Team Van Hollen
subject: From The Front Lines: Six Months Out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Dear Friend, We are six months away from the start of Early Vote in Maryland, and the campaign is charging ahead! Here are some of the highlights.
* First, Chris officially filed his candidacy for US Senate on October 6th, surrounded by supporters from all over Maryland. This ensures that his name will be on the ballot for the April 26th Primary and, with your continued help, for the General Election on November 8, 2016. [_**Click here to see photos of Chris and supporters as he officially filed his candidacy.**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fb8/70cdc2ba/47b622fc/3961534/2291720869/VEsH/ "https://www.facebook.com/VanHollenForMD/posts/10153197546091732")

* Then, we launched a new campaign video that highlights the broad support Chris has across the state from some of Maryland's top leaders and activists. [_**Click here to watch the video.**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fb8/70cdc2ba/47b622fc/3961535/2291720869/VEsE/ "http://vanhollen.org/")

* Now, we're on the air with our first campaign ad that speaks to Chris's focus on getting results for the people of Maryland and our country since he first entered public service. Chris is committed to fighting and winning on the issues that are important to Maryland families, and he has a record to prove that we can count on him to deliver results as our next US Senator. [_**Click here to watch the ad.**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fb8/70cdc2ba/47b622fc/3961532/2291720869/VEsF/ "http://vanhollen.org/news/video-watch-our-first-television-ad-highlighting-chriss-bold-effective-leadership-for-maryland-families/")

[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fb8/70cdc2ba/47b622fc/3961532/2291720869/VEsC/ "http://vanhollen.org/news/video-watch-our-first-television-ad-highlighting-chriss-bold-effective-leadership-for-maryland-families/") With six months to go before early voting begins, we have a flood of volunteers at campaign headquarters who are excited and ready to help send Chris to the US Senate. We set a big goal for our Volunteers this month: make 30,000 phone calls to voters, and we're more than halfway there! Want to get involved in our people powered movement to help Chris move Maryland and America forward? [_**Sign up today to volunteer for our campaign!**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fb8/70cdc2ba/47b622fc/3961533/2291720869/VEsD/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/volunteer-for-chris") We just filed our most recent quarterly fund raising report with the Federal Election Commission. Many thanks to everyone who has been able to help provide the resources we need to get out the message about Chris's effective leadership and vision for the future. The fact that 80% of Chris's support comes from inside Maryland shows the breadth and depth of his support and stands in stark contrast with his opponent, who has relied mostly on out-of-state funds. As we get closer and closer to the April 26th Primary, your support will be more important than ever. We hope you'll continue to reach out to your friends and family and help spread the word about Chris and his record of getting things done for Maryland families. Thanks for all you do, Team Van Hollen

| [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fb8/70cdc2ba/47b622fc/3961530/2291720869/VEsA/ "https://www.facebook.com/VanHollenForMD") | [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fb8/70cdc2ba/47b622fc/3961531/2291720869/VEsB/ "https://twitter.com/vanhollenformd")
